english: to join / to add / to submit (sich fügen: to comply, to resign oneself)
notes: 'gefügt' is the past participle of 'fügen'. The reflexive form 'sich fügen' means to comply with or resign oneself to something. The non-reflexive 'fügen' means to join or fit pieces together.

sentences.german: Der Schreiner fügte die Holzteile sorgfältig zusammen.
sentences.english: The carpenter carefully joined the wooden pieces together.

sentences.german: Er hat sich in sein Schicksal gefügt.
sentences.english: He has resigned himself to his fate.

sentences.german: Sie fügte sich in die Entscheidung der Gruppe.
sentences.english: She complied with the group's decision.
